incompatibleRuntime.title: This system is not supported by the bundled backend
incompatibleRuntime.description: AionUi opened, but the local AionCore backend cannot run on this Linux version. Please upgrade to a supported Linux distribution and restart AionUi.

incompleteInstallation.title: AionUi installation is incomplete
incompleteInstallation.description: This installation is missing required local resources, so AionCore cannot start. Please download and reinstall the latest AionUi. If the issue returns after reinstalling, check whether security or antivirus software quarantined AionCore.
incompleteInstallation.runtimeComponentDescription: This installation is missing required bundled runtime components, so {{resource}} cannot start. Reinstall the latest AionUi package. If it still happens after reinstalling, check whether security or antivirus software quarantined AionUi components.

packageArchitectureMismatch.title: AionUi package architecture mismatch
packageArchitectureMismatch.description: This AionUi package is for {{packageArch}}, but this Mac is {{deviceArch}}. You may have downloaded the wrong package. Please download and install the {{expectedArch}} package.

dataMigration.title: Local data migration failed
dataMigration.description: AionUi opened, but AionCore stopped while initializing local data. Reinstalling AionUi may not fix this. Send a diagnostics report or contact support so the local database migration can be inspected.

localDataRepair.title: Local data repair failed
localDataRepair.description: AionUi opened, but AionCore stopped while repairing local agent cache data. Reinstalling AionUi may not fix this. Send a diagnostics report or contact support so the local database can be inspected.
